metadata.description: Kubernetes security guardrails for AI code generation — NEVER/ALWAYS rules covering secrets, RBAC, networking, supply chain, LLM security, and more.

plugins.name: k8s-security
plugins.description: Enforce security best practices when generating Kubernetes manifests, Dockerfiles, Helm charts, and application code. Automatically applies NEVER/ALWAYS guardrails across 10 security domains.
